text:
The **Pro plan costs $30/month**.

With Pro, you get:
- Up to **3,000 pages** per audit
- **Daily crawl frequency** (plus manual, weekly, and monthly options)
- All features from the Growth plan (competitive intelligence) and Starter plan
- Access to download ZIP and PDF reports

You also get a **20% discount if you pay annually** instead of month-to-month.

Would you like help deciding which plan fits your audit needs, or do you have questions about what's included?
